# pkg/ — Generated by wasm-pack

This directory is generated by running:

```bash
cd web
npm run build:wasm
```

Which executes:
```
cd ../crate && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../web/src/pkg
```

The generated files include:
- `steeg_wasm.js` — WASM JS bindings (ES module)
- `steeg_wasm_bg.wasm` — compiled WASM binary
- `steeg_wasm.d.ts` — TypeScript type declarations
- `package.json` — wasm-pack metadata

**Do not commit the pkg/ directory** — it is excluded by `.gitignore`.

## Setup

1. Ensure you have the `crate/` directory (symlink or copy from steeg8ch-wasm-rs-web)
2. Install wasm-pack: https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/
3. Run `npm run build:wasm` from the `web/` directory
